basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitrpr.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Ropar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at IIT Ropar is June 8, 2026. Ensure your application is sent via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Tech degree or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for the Project Assistant position at IIT Ropar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000 plus 10% HRA. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Ropar Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Assistant at the Indian Institute of Technology Ropar.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial email application followed by an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Ropar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar is located in Rupnagar, Punjab.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of this job?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at IIT Ropar is a contractual job. The duration and terms will be as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is advisable to read it thoroughly before applying.
